industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Tianjin Tianbao Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Tianbao Energy Co., Ltd. generates and supplies power in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through three segments: Electricity Dispatch and Sale, Power Generation and Supply, and Other. It generates and supplies steam, heating, and cooling to industrial and commercial customers; and purchases, dispatches, and sells electricity. The company also provides power facility construction, and industrial facilities operation and maintenance; and trades in electrical components. It operates two back-pressure cogeneration units with a total installed capacity of 30 megawatts. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Tianjin, the People's Republic of China. Tianjin Tianbao Energy Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Tianjin Tianbao Holdings Limited.
